description: RESEARCHER_A acquires BACKGROUND_SECTION and INTRO_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_B acquires BACKGROUND_SECTION and METHODS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_C acquires EXPERIMENTS_SECTION and METHODS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_D acquires EXPERIMENTS_SECTION and RESULTS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_E acquires INTRO_SECTION and RESULTS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
Each researcher drafts locally before acquiring section locks for writing
Ring-shaped circular wait across 5 researchers: each holds one section lock and waits for the next, forming a 5-node cycle
